text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The threat of the URA Finale's cancellation has
the campus in an uproar.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What? The URA Finale might be called off?! No
way!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be kidding me... And I spent so long
planning how I was gonna show Scarlet up...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! Urgh, a race would've been the perfect way to settle this!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: NOOOO! The shock! The horror! All that training... wasted!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's a shame. I wanted to run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And the food stalls... I was looking forward to
those the most!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There seems to be widespread dissatisfaction
among the students regarding the cancellation of
the URA Finale.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
You're a trainer, right?! Is it true that the URA
Finale has been canceled? There were so many
racers I wanted to support...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I see. So the academy can't find any replacement
turf...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Rough turf would put the runners at risk, after
all... Still, it's unfortunate.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I heard about the URA Finale being canceled.
What a shame...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Meek and I finally resolved to seize victory there
together, too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans who are looking forward to the URA Finale...
Trainers and Umamusume who see it as their
goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What once started out as a mere declaration from
the director has clearly grown into something
much bigger. Its influence can still be felt, even in
this dark hour.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The cancellation isn't set in stone yet, is it?
There's just an issue with the turf.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: In that case... I won't give up until the end.
choice_data_list: I'll try and think of something!
I'll try and think of something!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Right! Let's put our heads together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We rack our brains for a way to save the URA
Finale.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Hrrragh!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Is that... the director? Where's she running off to
at a time like this?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Heave... ho!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew... How much of the track will this cover?
Twenty percent? Ten? Five?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what am I doing? How can I possibly grow all
this turf myself?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Enough! I can't think like that! Back to work!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Heave... ho! Grow, my beautiful turf! Grow so that
my beloved Umamusume can run—run towards
their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's trying to grow the turf for the
track herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a farm the size of the one Director Akikawa
purchased, it might actually be possible to grow
the turf we need.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...Right. There's no way the director can produce
all that turf alone.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But if she wasn't alone, then maybe... Just
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If two hands won't cut it, how about four? And if
we ask more and more people for help...
choice_data_list: Sounds like we've found our solution!
Sounds like we've found our solution!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's get to it,
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Exhaustion... Tiredness... Fatigue... But there's no
use feeling sorry for myself!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What's going on?! Where did this crowd
come from?!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Director! You're trying to grow turf for the URA
Finale, right? I heard all about it!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Let us help you out! I'm looking forward to this
event too much to miss it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
We also solicited volunteers on Twinkle Monthly's
official website.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: We'll have more hands on deck shortly.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: You all came to help? But... why?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Director! Look over there. There's more!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: More?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hah, I thought an honor student like you wouldn't want to get her hands dirty.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, think again! I'll do any job perfectly, no
matter what!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You go, King! You're doing a first-rate job! Say,
it'd be even more first-rate if you'd carry this soil!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's your job! Will you please take this seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You are quite the expert at handling earth, Miss
Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What kind of weird compliment is that?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Although, hold on... a Farmer Umadol? Maybe
that's a niche in the market!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: The students too?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is no longer your dream alone,
Director. The entire student body shares your
vision.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So when a certain pair reached out to me for
help... Why, it was simply my duty as student
council president to gather all the hands I could.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So when a certain pair reached out to me for
help... Why, it was simply my duty as student
council president to gather all the hands I could.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A certain pair?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: A certain pair?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We saw that you might need help growing the
turf, so we decided to ask for volunteers.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And when we put out the request... Well, as you
can see, a lot of people wanted to pitch in!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username> and
Trainer Kiryuin?!
choice_data_list: We all want the URA Finale to happen.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With this much help, we can grow plenty of turf...
More than enough for the URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Thank you! And once again, thank
you! I appreciate all of your help!
choice_data_list: Let's make the URA Finale a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Indubitably! Now, everyone... let's get to work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're all looking forward to the URA Finale, of
course, but I don't think that's why so many
people have come to help out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's really Director Akikawa's dedication that
brought us all together... or so I muse as I pitch in
planting turf.
